transcript.text:
I really like eating Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake)
It's been a while
[Rice cake pieces over flour rice cake]
[Jungwon Bunsik owner has logged out]
[I gotta watch this]
[But...]
So dumb of me
It stopped recording
I didn't press 'record' So I refilled the food
Hello everyone
I prepared some snacks to eat at home today
Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake) And Spicy Fishcake Skewers
Also Yubu rolls here (Fried tofu with rice)
Rice cake and fishcake skewer soup here
Fried goods
A little snack as a simple meal Bon appetit

Yubu rolls
Look how moist it is
Focus!
There
Dip it
Delicious
It usually has wasabi
[Well hello there]
You can include wasabi in here if you want, But I chose not to get it
I must eat the tteokboki now
Looks delicious
The chewiness of rice cake made with rice
There's a strong flavor like a black pepper flavor
A little spicy
And very chewy
[Calamari] (Fried squid)

WIth some tteokboki sauce
I should heat this up in the air fryer It's not crispy
[To the air fryer]
[Pause the mukbang]
[And she didn't come back]
[Pissed]
So dumb of me
I forgot to press 'record' again while I was heating the food up
[Lagging]
I refilled the food to record it again
No footage of me eating these, but I really did
Some more calamari
Freshly heated
It's really big Completely filled with squid
I've said that twice now
[Fried chili pepper]

I already had it, but I will act like it's my first
I'm not a fan of fried chili pepper
Not a fan, but it was good
[The crispy goodness]
[Not fun eating it normally]
[Let's make skewers!]
Stick it like this
There are some rice cakes that are cut right away
These are very chewy and elastic
This tastes best with some soy sauce But still good as it is
I really like the... How do I say this? Yubu water?
I like them drenched in sauce
[Spicy Fishcake Skewers]
Fried fishcake
Crazy visuals
Did I eat this already?

I wonder if it was recorded
[A satisfying meal]
This stretches out like cheese
[I might know exactly how that feels like]
[Fried mandu (dumplings)]
Really big, right?
This is good
Even if I didn't have 1 yet
What am I saying?
[2nd round of fuel]
Fried seaweed now These are so long
Right?
The long fried foods are trending right now
[2 at a time for the small pieces]
These are more like restaurant mandu than yaki mandu
I was worried that the food will not be good after refilling it

But still very yummy
[Wash it down with some soup really quick]
I already ate one of these fishballs
Nemo
Not really like fishcake
A high-quality fishcake
There's something here that I haven't tried
Cheeseballs need to be eaten warm, but these are cold now
Black rice cheeseball?
See the hardened cheese?
Tasty!
Even if it's cold
A combination of cream cheese and mozzarella
It's good
It's starting to get spicy
It's been spicy

It's worse now
Must wear white when eating Tteokboki
I've already made a mess
[As long as it tastes good]
Spicy!
Very spicy
Mandu
It's not that spicy, but it builds up over time
[Refill the soup]
[3rd round of fuel]
With a spoon for this
This is a fried boiled egg
I like rice cake made with rice because they are good after they've been sitting there for a while
[More soup]
1 of each left except the roll
This one

No
[Her 4th liter of beverage]
I'll eat the Yubu roll last because I liked it the most
More fried tofu than rice That's why it's so good
